FOREACH.declare: <DATA PAIS_NAC="10000" PAIS_NAC_txt="009-Argentina" PROVINCIA_NAC="10057" PROVINCIA_NAC_txt="59-Santa Fé" report="NucleusRH.Base.Personal.PERSONAL.repdef2" name="test" />

qry:select.name: SQL1
SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SPLIT('50;{%=$SOURCE/ROW/@oi_personal_emp %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT L.oi_personal_emp, P.c_personal, P.d_ape_y_nom, P.c_sexo, P.f_casamiento, ES.d_estado_civil, NA.d_nacionalidad, GS.d_grupo_sanguineo, P.f_nacim, P.d_email, P.te_celular, L_NAC.d_pais as LN_d_pais, L_NAC.d_provincia as LN_d_provincia, L_NAC.d_localidad as LN_d_localidad, DO.c_tipo_documento, P.c_nro_documento, P.c_nro_cuil, P.oi_usuario_sistema, E.oi_empresa, E.c_empresa, E.d_empresa, L.e_numero_legajo, L.f_ingreso, L.f_antiguedad_rec, L.f_egreso, L.e_solic_ingreso, L.f_inicio_contrato, L.f_fin_contrato, L.e_duracion_ctrato, L.e_q_renov_ctrato, UB.d_ubicacion, TP.d_tipo_personal, AC.d_indic_activo, CON.d_contrato, CON.d_tipo_contrato FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L, PER01_PERSONAL as P, ORG12_NACIONALID as NA, PER10_GRUPOS_SANG as GS, (SELECT LN.oi_localidad, PN.d_pais, NN.d_provincia, LN.d_localidad FROM ORG35_PAISES as PN, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as NN, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LN JOIN LN.oi_provincia INNER NN.oi_provincia, NN.oi_pais INNER PN.oi_pais) as L_NAC, (SELECT PER28_CONTRATOS.oi_contrato, PER28_CONTRATOS.d_contrato, PER28_TIPOS_CONTR.d_tipo_contrato FROM PER28_TIPOS_CONTR, PER28_CONTRATOS JOIN PER28_TIPOS_CONTR.oi_tipo_contrato INNER PER28_CONTRATOS.oi_tipo_contrato) as CON, PER20_TIPOS_DOC as DO, ORG03_UBICACIONES as UB, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as TP, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as AC, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as ES
JOIN E.oi_empresa INNER L.oi_empresa, L.oi_personal INNER P.oi_personal, P.oi_nacionalidad left outer NA.oi_nacionalidad, P.oi_grupo_sanguineo left outer GS.oi_grupo_sanguineo, P.oi_local_nacim left outer L_NAC.oi_localidad, P.oi_tipo_documento left outer DO.oi_tipo_documento, L.oi_ubicacion left outer UB.oi_ubicacion, L.oi_tipo_personal left outer TP.oi_tipo_personal, L.oi_indic_activo left outer AC.oi_indic_activo, L.oi_contrato left outer CON.oi_contrato, P.oi_estado_civil left outer ES.oi_estado_civil
WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%= $SOURCE/@ID %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_USER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILE('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades\\{%=$SOURCE/@oi_usuario_sistema %}.ENTIDAD.XML')/ENTIDAD

qry:select.name: SQL_ADICIONALES
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT L.oi_personal_emp, OS.d_obra_social, OS.dc_obra_soc, OS.c_obra_social, SI.d_sindicato, CC.d_centro_costo, FU.d_funcion, CA.d_calendario, FP.d_forma_pago, CAT.d_convenio, CAT.d_categoria, POS.d_posicion, POS.d_puesto, CIV.d_ape_y_nom as fam_ape_y_nom
FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L, (SELECT ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria, ORG18_CONVENIOS.d_convenio, ORG18_CATEGORIAS.d_categoria FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS, ORG18_CATEGORIAS JOIN ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_convenio INNER ORG18_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio) as CAT, (SELECT ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_posicion, ORG04_POSICIONES.d_posicion , ORG04_PUESTOS.d_puesto FROM ORG04_POSICIONES, ORG04_PUESTOS JOIN ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_puesto INNER ORG04_PUESTOS.oi_puesto) as POS, (SELECT PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_personal, PER01_FLIARES_PER.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER01_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM JOIN PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.oi_tipo_familiar WHERE PER15_TIPOS_FAM.c_tipo_familiar = \'1\') as CIV, PER06_OBRAS_SOC as OS, PER30_SINDICATOS as SI, ORG08_CS_COSTO as CC, ORG03_FUNCIONES as FU, ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS as CA, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as FP
JOIN L.oi_obra_social left outer OS.oi_obra_social, L.oi_sindicato left outer SI.oi_sindicato, L.oi_ctro_costo_ult left outer CC.oi_centro_costo, L.oi_funcion left outer FU.oi_funcion, L.oi_calendario_ult left outer CA.oi_calendario, L.oi_forma_pago left outer FP.oi_forma_pago, L.oi_categoria_ult left outer CAT.oi_categoria, L.oi_posicion_ult left outer POS.oi_posicion, L.oi_personal left outer CIV.oi_personal
WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%= $SOURCE/@ID %}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $ROWS/ROW JOIN $r/@oi_personal_emp INNER $i/@ID

qry:select.name: SQL_DOMICILIO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, LOC.d_localidad, LOC.d_provincia, LOC.d_pais, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_calle, PER01_DOMIC_PER.e_numero, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_piso, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_departamento, PER01_DOMIC_PER.te_1 FROM PER01_DOMIC_PER, (SELECT LN.oi_localidad, PN.d_pais, NN.d_provincia, LN.d_localidad FROM ORG35_PAISES as PN, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as NN, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LN JOIN LN.oi_provincia INNER NN.oi_provincia, NN.oi_pais INNER PN.oi_pais) as LOC, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal, PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_localidad left outer LOC.oi_localidad WHERE PER01_DOMIC_PER.l_domic_fiscal=1 and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%= $SOURCE/@ID %}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $ROWS/ROW JOIN $r/@oi_personal_emp INNER $i/@ID

qry:select.name: SQL_HIJOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, count(PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_familiar_per) as cantidad FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_personal, PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.oi_tipo_familiar WHERE PER15_TIPOS_FAM.c_tipo_familiar in (\'2\', \'3\', \'18\', \'19\') and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%= $SOURCE/@ID %}) GROUP BY PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $ROWS/ROW JOIN $r/@oi_personal_emp INNER $i/@ID

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_grupo_sanguineo as id, E.c_grupo_sanguineo as COD, E.d_grupo_sanguineo as DES FROM PER10_GRUPOS_SANG as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_estado_civil as id, E.c_estado_civil as COD, E.d_estado_civil as DES FROM ORG22_EST_CIVIL as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_empresa as id, E.c_empresa as COD, E.d_empresa as DES FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT U.oi_ubicacion as id, U.c_ubicacion as COD, U.d_ubicacion as DES FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES as U where U.oi_empresa={$SOURCE/@EMPRESA} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT U.oi_funcion as id, U.c_funcion as COD, U.d_funcion as DES FROM ORG03_FUNCIONES as U where U.oi_empresa={$SOURCE/@EMPRESA} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT U.oi_calendario as id, U.c_calendario as COD, U.d_fcalendario as DES FROM ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS as U, ORG03_FERIADOS_EMP as E JOIN U.oi_calendario INNER E.oi_calendario where E.oi_empresa={$SOURCE/@EMPRESA} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_indic_activo as id, E.c_indic_activo as COD, E.d_indic_activo as DES FROM PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_tipo_personal as id, E.c_tipo_personal as COD, E.d_tipo_personal as DES FROM PER11_TIPOS_PERS as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_centro_costo as id, E.c_centro_costo as COD, E.d_centro_costo as DES FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_convenio as id, E.c_convenio as COD, E.d_convenio as DES FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_categoria as id, E.c_categoria as COD, E.d_categoria as DES FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as E where E.oi_convenio={$SOURCE/@CONVENIO} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_puesto as id, E.c_puesto as COD, E.d_puesto as DES FROM ORG04_PUESTOS as E where E.oi_empresa={$SOURCE/@EMPRESA} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_posicion as id, E.c_posicion as COD, E.d_posicion as DES FROM ORG04_POSICIONES as E where E.oi_puesto={$SOURCE/@PUESTO} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_obra_social as id, E.c_obra_social as COD, E.d_obra_social as DES, E.dc_obra_soc as DES_C FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_forma_pago as id, E.c_forma_pago as COD, E.d_forma_pago as DES FROM PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_sindicato as id, E.c_sindicato as COD, E.d_sindicato as DES FROM PER30_SINDICATOS as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_pais as id, E.c_pais as COD, E.d_pais as DES FROM ORG35_PAISES as E ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_provincia as id, E.c_provincia as COD, E.d_provincia as DES FROM ORG35_PROVINCIAS as E where 1=1 {%?($SOURCE/@PAIS_NAC!='') {% and E.oi_pais={ $SOURCE/@PAIS_NAC } %} {% %} %} {%?($SOURCE/@PAIS_RES!='') {% and E.oi_pais={ $SOURCE/@PAIS_RES } %} {% %} %} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT E.oi_localidad as id, E.c_localidad as COD, E.d_localidad as DES FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES as E where 1=1 {%?($SOURCE/@PROVINCIA_NAC!='') {% and E.oi_provincia={$SOURCE/@PROVINCIA_NAC} %} {% %} %} {%?($SOURCE/@PROVINCIA_RES!='') {% and E.oi_provincia={$SOURCE/@PROVINCIA_RES} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY COD ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
